titleStmt.title: Ceṉṉivaṉam, Sāliyavanēśvarar temple, Māṟavarman Kulaśekhara, no year

summary.p: Supplementary record to . It records the tax-free land endowment made by the inhabitants of Tiruttiyūr-Muṭṭa-nāṭu for the same image of Tiruvātavūr-Nāyaṉār (Māṇikkavācakar) installed by Sundara-Pāṇḍiya-Paṭṭaṉ. The inscription extends the endowment in order to cover the expenses of the Mārkaḻi-Tiruvātirai festival and other details about the fiscal treatment of the lands.

div.p: makā kittikku mel mel kō-māṟupaṉmar-āṉa tribhuvaṉa-c-cakravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulacekara

Āḷun tiyatiyum pūrvvapakṣattu paurṇaiyum veḷḷi-k-kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇar-pūcattu nāḷ tiruttiyūr muṭṭattu Uṭaiyār tiruccaṉṉavaṉam uṭaiya-nāyaṉār kōyilil śrī mākeccura
cikāriyañceyvārka tiruttiyūr-muṭṭa nāṭṭu mainta nāṭṭavarōm piṭipāṭu paṇṇi-k kuṭutta pāricāvatu

Iṉ-ṉāyaṉār e cuntara-pāṇṭiya-paṭṭaṉ ēṟiyaruḷa-p paṇṇiṉa tiruvātavūr-nāyaṉāṟku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi vēṇṭum nimantattukkum tirumārkaḻi-t tiruvātirai ttukkum nāṅkaḷ puravilkkaḻittu ṟayiliy-āka niīrvar
ttu-k kuṭutta nilam āvatu

ṉāyaṉār kaṭamai Iva āṉ Ivvūr kaṭampaṅkuḷattu naṭuvil maṭaiyāl nirpāvum paṭai pala vayakkal taṭi Oṉṟum perumā caṉ pakkal vilai koṇṭa kōṭṭai-c ceyyāṉa Āvuṭaiyāṉ vayakkal taṭi Oṉṟum piṭā -p pēruṭaiyāṉ Uḷḷuṭṭār pa l vilai koṇṭa va
ṇṇāṉ cey taṭi Oṉṟum Ayvaṉ cey Iraṇṭum caṉṉaṉ Uṭaiya nāyaṉ pakkal vilai koṇṭa ṟ-c curukkam uṭpaṭa nāṭṭaḷavu cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kōlāl Aḷavu nilam Oru māvukkum Eppēṟpaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum nāṭiñca mariyāti cai veṭṭi muṭṭāvāḷ maṟṟum Eppēṟpaṭṭa I
ṟaikaḷum tavirttu Iṟaiyili kārāṇmai y-āka kuṭuttōm Iṉ-ṉilattāl uḷḷa ciripaṇṭāra-mutal uḷḷatu Iṉ-ṉāyaṉārkku Iṉṉāḷ mutal pala kaittalaiyilo viñcaṉattukku Iru-nāḻi nellum viṭṭu Amutu ceytaruḷuvār ākavum Amutu ceytu piracātam Iṉ-ṉāyanāṉārai Eḻuntaruḷa paṇṇiṉa cuntara-pāṇṭiya-paṭṭaṉukku Irunāḻi Arici-c-cōṟu peruvāṉ ākavum muppatu vaṭṭattār Irunāḻi Arici-c-cōṟu peṟuvārkaḷ ākavum niīkki y-uḷḷa mutal koṇ
ṭu tirumārkaḻit tirunāḷukku ttār kuṭṭattukku cilavāvat' ākavum Ip-paṭikku meṉokkiya maramum kiṇokkiya kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Eppēṟpa cuvākantariyaṅkaḷum cantirātittavaṟ celvat' āka kallilum cempilum veṭṭi-k-koḷḷa piṭipāṭu paṇṇi-k kuṭuttōm tiruttiyūr-muṭṭa-nāṭṭukku camainta nāṭṭavarōm tiruvātavūr nāyaṉāṟku Ippaṭikku nāṭṭukku camaintu nāṭṭu kaṇakku tirunākicuramuṭaiyār Eḻuttu
Itu māheśvarar rakṣai

app.note: Given the fact that it is a festival carried out during the month of Markāḻi and that it is related to Māṇikkavācakar, it is almost with certainty that the festival in question is the Tiruvātirai festival.

div.p: Since the inscription is clearly a supplement to of the same king, it was probably issued afterwards, meaning between the 38th year of the previous record and the last regnal year of king Maṟavarman, the 40th year.
This edition by Renato Dávalos (2026), based on .
